title: Sensex, Nifty Close The Day In Red Amid FII Selling And Elevated Crude Oil Prices
description: As of filing this report, Brent Crude is currently trading at USD 111.30, reflecting a positive movement of USD 3.07 or 2.84 per cent. In contrast, Gold has experienced a decline, priced at USD 4,611.21 with a drop of USD 71.95, representing a 1.54 per cent decrease
